name: scratchtml
description: Share and review any markdown/HTML document — reports, implementation plans, designs, mockups — on scratchtml's ephemeral, commentable links. Plans are uploaded for inline review, then Claude watches the document by default — answering comments, pushing revisions, and showing live per-step 'Claude is …' status to viewers as people review; say 'implement' to build or 'stop watching' to stop. Plans are authored visual-by-default (mermaid diagrams + inline HTML mockups) while staying Markdown for clean revision diffs. Includes share/get/list commands.

plan_review.title: Plan review
plan_review.description: Review plans on scratchtml before exiting plan mode (every plan, across permission modes).

auto_open.title: Auto-open in browser
auto_open.description: Open uploaded plans in the browser automatically (local sessions only).

approve_mode.title: Approval mode
approve_mode.description: Valid values: 'ask' or 'auto'. 'ask' shows the built-in approval dialog after review; 'auto' approves reviewed plans automatically in auto mode. Any other value behaves as 'ask'.

ui_mockups.title: UI mockups in plans
ui_mockups.description: Encourages Claude to include inline HTML/CSS/SVG mockups to illustrate UI layout ideas in plans.

diagrams.title: Mermaid diagrams in plans
diagrams.description: Encourages Claude to use mermaid fences for flows and architecture diagrams (rendered on scratchtml).
